review_title: Rank I.Q., The Code Cracker.
description: I really like Rank I.Q., it has really delivered for me, the customer service is outstanding.
author: Dann M.
pros: Rank I.Q. Saves me from "hit and miss" keywords; I pick a subject to write about, input the longtail keyword phrase into 'Run a new report,' and within minutes, it has gathered the pertinent information/keywords I need to focus on in their relevant order of importance. From there, I format my article outline. "What do you like most about this software?" That is not hard for me to answer; it works and works very well. I was new to blogging and owning a website; I struggled, was about to give up as I do everything myself, and knew nothing when I started about WordPress, hosting, etc. It was doing nothing but costing me money, and I felt I was paying to be frustrated. I found Rank I.Q. by accident last April, in May, I decided that I would take a chance before I "threw in the towel." My first article was published on May 23rd; it was ranking for the specific term/longtail I had chosen in two days on the first page of Google; that article now has five number one spots, and I don't know how many other first page rankings, it always seems to be growing. Might I add, that article is "knocking out" some big names in my area of interest. This experience with the one article is not a fluke or a "one-off" I have just a few articles on the website, I have been slow in adding articles, and the domain ranking is about as low as you can get, but another article has done the same. I wonder if these huge authority websites I am ranking above are wondering how I am doing it.
cons: What do I least like? I can't think of much I don't like, other than feeling pressured to run the allotted reports on a new keyword each month or lose them at the end of the month; it would be nice if the unused reports would carry over into the following month. I do use another keyword finder that covers my area a bit better and then plug those keywords into Rank I.Q. in addition to what I find in Rank I.Q., but the libraries of Rank I.Q. are growing all the time, so I figure it is just a matter of time before my area/topics are more thoroughly covered.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The PERFECT Tool for Bloggers and Marketing Professionals (New and Veteran)
description: This has saved me loads of time in the most important (and often most expensive) aspect of blogging... keyword research. I was wading through quicksand trying to create a list of upcoming blogs and figuring out how to optimize my keyword research. In my effort to be an efficient blogger, I was wasting time considering options and second-guessing myself. RankIQ swooped in like a superhero to show me the way. In the first month, I have 5 articles published over two Blog Sites and a blog planner booked into June. I love you, RankIQ!
author: Daniel K.
pros: RankIQ is turning out to be the best (low-cost) investment that a blogger can make! The SEO report is no fluff. It doesn't give excessive metrics in an effort to 'show off'. Instead it shows you what counts: the top keywords, the topics Google's algorithm wants you to cover, and the current best examples of content that is already doing a good job. You can see a relative estimate of length of time it will take to rank (provided you follow it's suggestions), a suggested wordcount, and the average 'quality' of those who are already at the top of Google's list. Next it the real gem in my opinion: the Content Optimizer. This is stripped down notepad that does a lot under the hood. It gives you a running wordcount and a list of the topics/keywords to use. As you climb toward the suggested word count and use up the quality keywords, you can see your content grade climbing. There is definitely something satisfying about the gamification and being able to trust that your content will be viewed favorably by Google. I'm a relatively new blogger (just shy of a year) but this takes so much stress out of keyword research AND content creation. I feel like someone gave me a fast pass to how to do this blogging thing and saved me years of headaches.
cons: Currently only 16 reports available per month. At the risk of sounding greedy, my blogging plans will require more in the near future.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Bloggers outside of USA may struggle
description: As a UK-based blogger, the data was limited. My niche means its hard for my content to appeal to US-based readers because of the differences in content e.g. tax laws and financial products available.
author: Jordan W.
pros: I love the main concept. No other tools offer this functionality.
cons: The yearly estimated volume would be better as a monthly volume.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Bravo! Rank IQ Truly Does Make SEO Easy.
description: As an entrepreneur in the fitness industry it can be difficult to service clients while still finding time to create quality content to generate leads. I’ve quickly realized that SEO strategy including keyword research, formatting title tags and meta descriptions, as well as crafting on-page content is a skillset that takes time to perfect and master. Not only is the keyword research process tedious and time consuming, but also extremely confusing and frustrating. But what’s most notable is that performing this process is crucial if you want 1st page rankings in the google SERPS. Enter Rank IQ. Rank IQ’s AI software truly takes the guesswork out of keyword research. From keyword research libraries (broken down by niche) and blog topics to suggested article word count and overall content grade and analysis, Rank IQ delivers outstanding and measurable results. Conclusion: Bravo! Rank IQ truly does make SEO easy. Sign-up! I can assure you that you’ll undoubtedly find some “golden keyword nuggets” within their keyword libraries that you can rank for quickly without having to spend countless hours trying to find keywords on your own. While I’ll still continue to use other SEO software such as AHREFS for backlinking, DA and site traffic reports, Rank IQ is not something I will do without. Simply stated: Rank IQ is that good and a must-have for all serious bloggers that want to have their posts read. I highly recommend Rank IQ to all newbie and veteran bloggers alike.
author: Christian G.
pros: Overall: Software is easy-to-use and very intuitive. Customer Service: Customer service is on-point and the software was created by a successful, SEO marketer and blogger—which I really like! Price: Can't beat the price for a tool that delivers outstanding results for half the price of competitors. Results: Keyword libraries are easy-to-use and I love that I can archive keyword reports for future reference. Content Optimizer: I love this feature as it allows me to grade my content before I even post for assured rankings and user experience.
cons: In the future and as this software evolves, I'd love to see features such as backlinking and site traffic reports. However, that's just me selfishly wanting a tool that's all encompassing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: RankIQ is hands down the best SEO toolset available for bloggers!
description: RankIQ is hands down the best SEO toolset I have come across. In the past I have used Ahrefs and SEM Rush and although I love Ahrefs, in comparison RankIQ is much easier to use. If you are a fairly new blogger like me and are just learning SEO, RankIQ does all the hard work for you. I enjoyed using Ahrefs but found it complicated and frequently the keywords I found didn't get my posts to rank. With RankIQ all of the keywords have worked straight away and all of my new posts are ranking on the first page of Google. It's like having someone holding your hand while you get started on your blogging journey. I'm just so grateful to have found this tool.
author: Olivia H.
pros: This brilliant toolset takes all the hard work out of SEO! It’s so easy and straightforward to use and the results are amazing. In less than a month my new blog posts are already ranking on the first page of Google, my blog is getting more traffic and my income has gone up! My favourite thing about the tool is the keyword library which is like gold dust! I’ve found so many new keywords in my niche that I’d never thought of before! It feels like RankIQ is a helping hand for small bloggers like me who are still trying to learn SEO – the keywords are done for you and all you need to do is write the post! Brandon also provides great customer service, and I’ve always had a fast and helpful response whenever I’ve reached out. For such a great product it’s also really affordable! Now I’m just excited to see how much RankIQ can help my blog to grow!
cons: You get 16 reports a month. I was so excited to start trying out the keywords that I ended up using all my reports very quickly. I believe though that in the future there will be the option to buy extra reports so I think this issue will be remedied.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The Best SEO Tool I've Found
description: I wasn't sure how I'd like RankIQ before trying it. I worried there wouldn't be enough keywords in my niche or that it would be hard to use. Now, I have to say it's been by far the best investment I've made this year in my business. It has saved me so much time keyword planning, offers a ton of niches, and it's also so easy to use. I feel empowered and excited in creating my content now, and I had felt burned out before trying this software. The support is also amazing. You can tell this business is personally ran by a family and small team because of the care they put into any responses. I love knowing I am supporting another passionate entrepreneur that is a true expert in the field.
author: Kalee D.
pros: I love that RankIQ provides me with high opportunity keywords in my niche. It has already saved me hours of keyword research, and it easily allowed me to plan out content for the next year. The Report option is also amazing for creating new content, as well as, optimizing old content.
cons: I do wish I could search the whole library of keywords without picking a niche. I'd also like to sort the KW lists by competition or volume.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Home reno and flipping blog improved with RankIQ
description: Love it! The quality of my blog posts have increased significantly by using the content optimizer. Now when I'm providing a home flipping or renovation tutorial, I am more effective in using the words that Google wants to see. It's interesting to see how using the words that are just a little more descriptive can ramp up my post.
author: Marcia S.
pros: I love that this software provides me with post ideas that have low competition. In many cases, when I'm looking through the categories, I realize that I have content for the topic, but I just never thought of writing a post on it! This has helped me to utilize my information more effectively and has given me some great post ideas.
cons: The one thing I am working on understanding is whether or not a topic that I choose is a good one. When I input my own topic, the software is great at telling me what words I should include and how long my post should be. However, I don't feel like I get the sense of what the competition will be for the topic. I'm not sure if that's something that's being developed in the product, or if it's something that's there and I'm just not seeing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I love the content editor!
description: Using RankIQ has helped bridge the gap I always had in knowing how I was doing with my writing. I'm able to even copy/paste my older posts into the content optimizer and see where it's lacking and what keywords I can plug in to help the post's SEO.
author: Tiffany N.
pros: My absolute favorite feature of this SEO software is the content optimizer. It lets you plug in all of your content for your blog posts and tells you keywords to add to your writing. At the same time, it grades you on your progress and how many words to write in order to rank for the overall keyword title you have. I also love that if you are looking for more keywords to rank for, the search lets you know how easily it could potentially be to rank for them.
cons: I'd like to be able to search for the keyword and see more recommended/related keywords similar to the one I am looking for. Right now, RankIQ is adding more keywords all the time to strengthen their keyword search results so I looking forward to using this feature when more of it becomes available.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: THE Software For Content Creators
description: It's great. It saves me so much time. I can find some low competition keywords quickly and then put together a post outline in minutes instead of hours. When my writer is done with the post, I paste in the AI tool to see its grade and make any additional improvements.
author: Jon D.
pros: The best parts of RankIQ are the two main features. By having a pre-researched set of low competition keywords, it saves me hours. Granted I still do keyword research on my own, but having this allows me to quickly spot some easy to rank for keywords and get to work. And having the AI function guiding me along the writing process is priceless. I no longer guess if my content is good enough to rank. I know it is. There is no guarantee that it will rank, but by following the directions, I have a better chance of it happening.
cons: There were a few bugs, but that was expected since it was in beta. I also would love to see more sorting and organizing features as well. I emailed [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] about my ideas and he replied to me the next day saying most were already set for the next version and would consider the others.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: RankIQ is Fantastic
author: Patty M.
pros: I love everything about RankIQ. It is easy to use, offers great features, has invaluable benefits such as the Facebook Group where Brandon answers questions, and more. This is my number 1 software for blogging/writing posts.
cons: I cannot say I negative thing about this software. It is absolutely amazing and makes the world of difference when writing posts.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Rank IQ is a game changer
description: My experience overall has been amazing, I remember searching for something that will change the game for me as a new travel blogger. I needed something that would cut the work in half (work smarter not harder) & RankIQ does exactly that! [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] is truly God sent! I appreciate this product.
author: Joanna O.
pros: Finding related key words to add within the body of the text can be a long process! Rank IQ has helped a lot with this, helping me write the most optimised post.
cons: Sometimes I want to see the word count of a post before actually writing it, so maybe a preview before running report to make sure I don’t run out of reports by the end of the month.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A hidden gem!
description: It's driving traffic to my website from the articles I have optimised with it so a complete winner! There is a great Faceboook group you can join when you subscribe with everyone being so helpful. A delightful experience using RankIQ!
author: Rachel B.
pros: I absolutely love using RankIQ. It makes my articles much more SEO friendly to rank higher. It's really easy to use and can't wait to explore more keywords for my projects!
cons: I'm based in the UK and it's very US orientated for keywords. So I would love to see a UK keywords option in the future.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The best software ever
author: Irina T.
pros: I've been using RankIQ for a while to say only positive words. It is excellent at keyword research and running a competitive analysis. The best tool to invest in if you are a blogger.
cons: No cons to say about RankIQ, only big thanks.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Highly Recommend RankIQ
description: Overall, my experience with RankIQ has been incredible. This tool has helped me write high-performing, long-form articles in half the time it used to take me. This time savings allows me to focus on other components of my developing business. I’m extremely happy to be a part of this product’s early development and am excited to see where it goes from here. I look forward to using this program for years to come.
author: Orlando L.
pros: I love this software for a few reasons. For starters, this program is straightforward and easy to use. For people like me, who are still learning a lot in this field, this program really simplifies the research process and provides actionable results. The program is suitable for beginners who are looking for simple instruction, but also suitable for the advanced professionals looking for a powerful tool that uses artificial intelligence. I also love that the software tells you exactly what you need to know about your research topic and doesn’t include a bunch of fluff to be distracted. The application is direct with this results. Lastly, the customer service and development team has been incredibly responsive in providing insight and resolving any issues.
cons: Not much. Having been one of the first users of this software, there were some initial bugs that needed to worked out (expected). The customer service and development team resolved this issues within a week or two and are continuing to rollout new features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Invaluable Tool for New Website Owners
author: Renee C.
pros: The thing I love about Rank IQ is how EASY it is to use compared to other keyword research tools. The AI is spot-on, and using Rank IQ to write posts has already helped my posts rank faster. They've taken all the guesswork out of keyword research with the keyword suggestions tool that specifies which keyword phrases are "ultra fast" to rank for.
cons: You can't research competitors on Rank IQ yet, so I still use my other keyword research programs for competitor research. But when it comes to finding keyword phrases to target and optimizing my existing content for search engines, Rank IQ is amazing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: RANKIQ GETS THE TOP RANK!
description: Very good. For someone who started blogging a few months back, I found RankIQ the easiest and most friendly software. It is meant for a blogger.
author: Suresh K.
pros: The biggest challenge a blogger, especially the newbies, face is the Writers Block. To find out a topic that is in your niche area and selecting the keywords and structuring the blog is a challenge. RankIQ resolves that problem. I found it extremely useful and the various topics it has in the niche areas, gives one enough topics to write about. The Keyword research is done in most of the niche areas, so the only job left for a blogger is to write out a quality article. RankIQ has taken out the trouble of the hours and hours of keyword research by bloggers. The suggestions for good titles and the approximate timing of the first page ranking of the blog is also quite useful.
cons: The interface could be better designed. It is quite plain and simple, (though functional) right now. There is no facility to Group "My Keywords Library" into various subjects/themes. Without this facility all my Keywords are in a single table and it is time consuming to filter them properly. The report should be in a downloadable format, so that it can be used offline.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Helping me get to the next level
description: [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] has been fantastic at communicating and following up on questions and making sure the experience is a good one. I've appreciated the process so far and look forward to seeing the growth of posts that I create and update using the system.
author: Ron W.
pros: What I am really noticing is that RankIQ's optimizing process is helping me create more well rounded posts. While I appreciate the SEO optimization, the process is also helping me evaluate what should be a part of a particular post. I feel like I put a lot more thought into what I write, and I feel like it's less a shot in the dark.
cons: I'm not sure there's anything I dislike. If there were anything I wished were different about my experience, it's that I could take advantage now of new features that will be added. That just goes with the territory of being an early subscriber.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: RanqIQ is So Easy to Use!
description: I'm a relatively new user as it's only the first month the product has been out, but it's really exciting to watch posts crawl up the SEO ladder!
author: Kelly S.
pros: So much work has gone into selecting keywords that are already winners that it makes my work so much easier. I can instantly see what I've done wrong in writing an article and how I can improve.
cons: It would be great if I could copy and paste back and forth into Wordpress as I'm trying to improve an article, but it's really a small thing and I'm getting used to just making the changes right in Wordpress and checking them again to see how I've improved.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I wasn't sure what to expect. I was blown away.
description: I am not an SEO expert. I am not even a knowledgeable user. RankIQ covers the gaps and simply gives me the information I need to write powerful content that actually reaches my audience.
author: Shawna W.
pros: The ability to easily access keyword suggestions and have detailed information readily available as to how to best use them in absolutely invaluable. This is like 3-4 tools in one. Having RankIQ's direction literally every step of the way, from research to hitting the publish button, is exactly what I needed to begin to move the needle in my business.
cons: Only that there is so much available, it's taking me a while to work through all the different ways to interact with and use the site to the best of its ability.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An SEO Must Have!
description: The time saving keywords available and the optimizer are top notch. I know my blog will grow leaps and bounds with Rankiq.
author: Jasmine A.
pros: After spending months looking for a keyword research tool that would fit my budget and give me the information I need, I heard about Rankiq on [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN]'s podcast. I patiently waited for its release. I was not disappointed! Not only does this tool save me time, provide me with great keywords, but the grading system leaves me confident I have written a great post. When I needed a bit of help one day, [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] himself answered me quickly to help!
cons: My only con was the difficulty of using the optimizer with old posts. However, this has already been fixed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: More than just content optimization and keyword research
author: Anne Marie N.
pros: What I love about RankIQ is its unique SEO database which helps you build a solid content calendar for your niche. They do the keyword research for you! In addition, their reports help you identify the REAL keywords and LSI keywords your competition is using, so your content is properly optimized. RankIQ helps you go for the gold. I'm already seeing results after a few weeks!
cons: It's still early in development, so I know the RankIQ team is working on features to make it more user-friendly. I wish for a better editor and that I could copy and paste things instead of rewriting all my keyword data, for example.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Keyword research help is here!
description: I'm excited to watch the traffic come rolling in after giving a handful of recipes posts some love thanks to RankIQ. This is unlike any SEO keyword research tool I have ever seen and there seems to be so much potential. Keyword research has never been so exciting!
author: Megan P.
pros: I love how thorough RankIQ is and the fact that thousands of keywords have already been researched and are ready for bloggers to use.
cons: I ran a few reports soon after signing up without knowing I was doing so, so I lost 2 of my monthly reports right off the bat. I learned quickly, though!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Keyword Tool
description: The tool is super user-friendly and efficient.
author: Christina P.
pros: RankIQ is a great tool to find high quality keywords with minimal effort. I used the tool to generate keyword ideas for my blog, and I discovered over 40 unique, high traffic blog ideas in less than an hour! I have only been using the tool for a month, but I am excited to see a huge spike in traffic soon.
cons: I hope RankIQ continues to add more keywords for my category. If they do not continually update, it will not continue to be useful
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Next Level SEO
description: I am really excited to have RankIQ. I love how it scores my SEO work and gives me a more accurate idea of how well I am doing and how I can improve.
author: Scarlet P.
pros: What I most like about RankIQ is that is unlike anything I have ever had access to before. While it is similar to some of the functionality I get with SEMRush, it offers a more in depth tool to optimize articles as well as a whole new feature keyword library.
cons: I would like to be able to see potential traffic information in with the reports.

review_title: RankIQ Helped me rank within 2 Weeks
description: Overall, I am happy with RankIQ. I would recommend this tool to others.
author: Suzanne B.
pros: This keyword checklist on this tool has made my writing more thorough. I get subtopic ideas while I'm writing. The posts I have written using RankIQ have all ranked first or second page within a couple weeks.
cons: It would be great to be able to write within the tool without it glitching out and not saving my work.
